rationale: No conflict. Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption affects property tax appraised value; Educ. Code §31.106 merely authorizes school districts to use local funds for instructional materials. Different subject matter, no operative interaction.
quote: a school district or open-enrollment charter school may use local funds to purchase any instructional materials not included on the list of rejected instructional materials maintained by the State Board of Education under Section 31.022(a).
_note: Indirect fiscal pressure on school district local funds is plausible but does not constitute a statutory conflict with §31.106's permissive language.
